{{Infobox character
| name = Dragon King
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Dragon King
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Dragon King Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Seshethkunaaz]], known as the Dragon [[King]], is the monarch of the eastern [[Ashwind continent]]. He typically manifests in the form of a human boy with tanned skin, dark hair, sandy hair, and golden eyes, often wearing a brown cloak. While he holds an admiration for humanity, he harbors a deep disdain for human civilization due to its societal structures that prioritize the weak over the strong. He is characterized by a sense of draconic pride and arrogance, viewing his kind as superior beings. His power is immense; even a glance at him can trigger a sense of danger, and his spirit possesses the strength of an [[Underlord]]. He has subordinates including [[Xorrus]], known as the Desert-bringer, and [[Garrylondryth]], the [[Rootfather]], who served as his right hand. The Dragon [[King]] can project his authority and spirit through a [[Totem]], which can manifest as a golden serpent or a crown of power. He is also associated with the [[Weeping Dragon]], a powerful entity that has grown more cunning and strong following the deaths of other kings.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dragon King]] may take what he wants if the [[Akura clan]] appears weak.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dragon King]] conducts raids to the north.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dragon King]] is gaining influence.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dragon King]] flies over his throne.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Driven by a fierce desire to protect his future champion, the Dragon [[King]] remains deeply dissatisfied with how the contest has unfolded. During a confrontation with [[Malice]], his willpower manifests as a gust of sand shaped like a snarling serpent. Despite the escalating threat posed by this battle, he does not intend to advance further.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]] will do anything to protect his future champion.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]] is dissatisfied with the turn of events in the contest.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]]'s willpower is contained in a gust of sand shaped like a snarling serpent.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]] was fighting [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dragon King]] did not intend to advance despite the threat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Herald]] [[sacred beasts]] have become scarce since the fall of the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|"I suppose the Dragon King doesn’t intend to advance. There was a chance he would, given the threat."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Akura clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
